name: SQL Query Writer
description: Writes, explains and optimises SQL queries for any dialect. Handles joins, CTEs, window functions and performance tuning.
author: Data Team
example_prompt: Write a query that shows monthly revenue by product category for the last 12 months

name: PowerPoint Builder
description: Creates polished, structured PowerPoint presentations from outlines or raw content. Applies company templates and slide best practices.
author: Communications Team
example_prompt: Turn this project update into a 5-slide executive deck

name: Meeting Notes Structurer
description: Transforms raw meeting notes or transcripts into clean summaries with decisions, actions and owners clearly separated.
author: Operations Team
example_prompt: Structure these notes from today's project standup

name: Data Analysis Assistant
description: Guides exploratory data analysis, suggests the right statistical approach, writes Python/R code and interprets results in plain language.
author: Data Team
example_prompt: Help me analyse this customer churn dataset and identify key drivers

name: Professional Email Writer
description: Drafts clear, well-toned professional emails for any situation — proposals, follow-ups, difficult conversations, stakeholder updates.
author: HR Team
example_prompt: Write a follow-up email to a client who hasn't responded in two weeks
